blocks.text: Quick confirmation so it is in writing. The date holds. I have the outreach schedule built back from it, and the draft media list is all but final, pending the two outlets you wanted to add.

The one thing still open on our side is the approver you were going to name. Laura Bradley has the revised messages ready to route the moment we have it, and Kimberly Le has flagged two reporters worth briefing quietly ahead of the wider push. None of that moves until you confirm the sign-off path.
So we are in good shape for the {{fact:f:E-2022-001.client}} announcement as long as that one name comes back this week. Send it across and I will close out the schedule.
